name: Message Rendering
summary: Renders chat messages with rich content support including Markdown (via react-markdown + GFM), inline image previews, syntax-highlighted code blocks, and hierarchical tool event visualization using a tree structure.
goals: Render markdown content with GitHub Flavored Markdown support
Display inline images from agent messages with click-to-preview
Transform flat tool event arrays into hierarchical tree for nested display
Support syntax highlighting for code blocks using Prism

acceptanceCriteria.given: A message contains markdown with headers, lists, and code blocks
acceptanceCriteria.then: all markdown elements display correctly with proper styling

acceptanceCriteria.given: A message contains image content blocks
acceptanceCriteria.then: images are displayed inline with click-to-zoom preview

acceptanceCriteria.given: Agent events include nested tool use (tool within tool)
acceptanceCriteria.then: events are organized into a parent-child tree structure

unit-test.given: A flat array of tool events with parent-child pairs
unit-test.then: events are correctly grouped into nested tool use/result pairs

unit-test.given: A message contains very long code blocks (1000+ lines)
unit-test.then: the code block renders without performance degradation

end-to-end.given: Agent sends a message with markdown and images
end-to-end.when: the message renders in the chat

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
